---
title: "OCI Wazuh Deployment"
date: "07-20-2026"
categories: [guides]
format: 
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
    code-block-background: true
execute:
  freeze: true
---

# Introduction

## What is Wauzh


[Wazuh](https://documentation.wazuh.com/current/getting-started/index.html)

# Deployments

## Deploy with OKE



## Deploy with Instances

# Summary
